wordplay_note: A congregation of neuroses — he is deeply disturbed
card_description: Richard Kongrosian (meaning "Kongrosian = echoes congress/congregation") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Simulacra*. Psychokinetic pianist who is so neurotic he believes he is becoming invisible. Name note: A congregation of neuroses — he is deeply disturbed. The artist as basket case — genius and madness inseparable. First appears in *The Simulacra*.

reference.brief: Psychokinetic pianist who is so neurotic he believes he is becoming invisible
reference.significance: The artist as basket case — genius and madness inseparable
